pulse: Markets sit at record highs as the US-Iran ceasefire expiring April 21 enters its most critical diplomatic stretch. The Nasdaq logged its 12th consecutive positive session on April 16, its longest winning streak since 2009. Oil retreated from war-peak levels on Hormuz reopening hopes, but Netflix 9% after-hours plunge and Bitcoin stuck below $75K keep pockets of risk alive.

movers.name: NFLX
movers.reason: Q2 revenue guidance of $12.5B missed $12.65B consensus; co-founder Reed Hastings announcing board exit after 29 years triggered sentiment shock despite Q1 earnings beat.

movers.name: KOSPI
movers.reason: South Korea surged on ceasefire optimism and tech-sector carry from Nasdaq record streak; chip exporters led gains.

movers.name: N225
movers.reason: Nikkei rallied 1,472 pts to 59,606; yen weakness and Wall Street record highs provided dual tailwinds for Japanese exporters.

movers.name: BTC
movers.reason: Bitcoin holding near $75,412; Fear and Greed Index at Extreme Fear (23) despite tentative bullish technicals.

movers.name: Brent
movers.reason: Crude retreated from war-peak levels as Strait of Hormuz re-opening and ceasefire extension talks reduced supply-shock premium.

movers.name: SPX
movers.reason: S&P 500 hit fresh all-time high at 7,041; AI-driven earnings growth and Iran ceasefire optimism sustaining the 2-week rally.

stocks: STI context: index at 5,008 (-0.27%). Singapore equities under mild pressure; monitor MAS policy signals and regional risk tone.
Chinese solar sector; watch for US-China tension spillover from AI model-copying dispute. Cautious near-term.
portfolio: MARC PORTFOLIO SNAPSHOT SGD base April 17 2026. US EQUITIES at record highs after 12-day Nasdaq streak, consider trimming if ceasefire collapses. IBEX35 at 18,240 with banks powering gains, hold positive bias. STI 5,008 mildly soft. ASIA HSI +0.82%, KOSPI +2.21%. GOLD $3,092 slight pullback but strong hedge. OIL Brent $94.89 -2.1% consider hedging. BTC $75,412 Extreme Fear 23 reduce below $73K. KEY BINARY RISK: Ceasefire expires April 21. Breakdown sends oil to $105+, VIX to 25+, equities -3 to -5% intraday.

alerts.text: US-IRAN CEASEFIRE EXPIRES APRIL 21. Talks inconclusive. Iran FM says US acting in bad faith. Breakdown triggers oil +10%, equities -5% scenario.
Netflix NFLX -9% after-hours on weak Q2 guidance and Reed Hastings board exit. Watch for contagion in streaming media sector at open.
BTC Fear and Greed Index at 23 Extreme Fear. Range-bound near $75K resistance. Break above opens $80K; failure risks $73K.
IMF cuts 2026 global growth to 3.1%, inflation revised to 4.4%. Adverse scenario cuts growth to 2.5%.
Nasdaq 12-day winning streak longest since July 2009. Take-profit discipline advised on US tech positions.
Anthropic Claude Mythos 5 10T params launched. OpenAI approaching $25B ARR eyeing late-2026 IPO.

news.title: US-Iran Ceasefire on the Clock Expiry April 21 Talks Stalled
news.text: The two-week US-Iran ceasefire brokered by Pakistan on April 8 expires Monday April 21. Iran FM Abbas Araghchi accused the US of maximalism and shifting goalposts after Islamabad talks failed. First US Navy ships transited the Strait of Hormuz this week. Markets have priced in resolution; breakdown would be violent reversal across all asset classes.

news.title: Trump A Whole Civilisation Will Die Tonight Without Iran Deal
news.text: President Trump warned of catastrophic consequences if Iran does not finalise a Strait of Hormuz agreement. He simultaneously confirmed calls with Lebanese President Aoun and Israeli PM Netanyahu signalling a broader regional settlement push encompassing Lebanon and Gaza.

news.title: Nasdaq Logs 12th Consecutive Gain Longest Streak Since 2009
news.text: The tech-heavy Nasdaq closed at 24,102 on April 16 its 12th straight positive session. S&P 500 hit fresh all-time highs at 7,041. Weekly gains SPX +3.3% Nasdaq +5.2%. JPMorgan and Goldman Sachs both reported blowout Q1 earnings.

news.title: Netflix -9% After-Hours Reed Hastings Out Guidance Disappoints
news.text: Netflix beat Q1 earnings but Q2 guidance of $12.5B came in below $12.65B consensus. Co-founder Reed Hastings announced board exit after 29 years. Stock fell 9% to $98 in after-hours. Q1 EPS included $2.8B Warner Bros breakup fee.

news.title: IMF Slashes 2026 Global Growth to 3.1% Shadow of War
news.text: The IMF April 2026 World Economic Outlook cut global growth to 3.1% and raised headline inflation to 4.4%. Middle East oil shock is the primary driver. Adverse scenario pushes growth to 2.5%; severe scenario to 2%.

news.title: Russia Unleashes Mass Drone-Missile Barrage on Ukraine
news.text: Russia attacked Ukrainian civilian areas with hundreds of drones and dozens of missiles in a multi-hour assault killing at least 16 people. Energy infrastructure targeted. Ukraine simultaneously struck Russian oil export terminals on the Baltic Sea.

news.title: Lebanon-Israel Negotiations First Direct Talks in 30 Years
news.text: Lebanon and Israel are preparing direct diplomatic negotiations their first in over 30 years potentially ending the conflict with Hezbollah. Israel also agreed to a ceasefire in Gaza. The US is brokering across three tracks simultaneously Iran Lebanon and Gaza.

news.title: Air India Seeks New CEO After Campbell Wilson Resignation
news.text: Air India is searching for a new chief executive after Campbell Wilson announced his departure. Wilson had led the airline transformation under Tata Group ownership. Timing is sensitive given oil price volatility and route disruptions from Iran conflict airspace closures.

news.title: Universal Music Group Sale Imminent
news.text: Universal Music Group home to Taylor Swift is reportedly about to be sold in one of the largest media transactions in recent history with major implications for streaming royalty economics.

news.title: Trump Lobbies Global Coalition Against Antifa Pope Leo Clash
news.text: The Trump administration is lobbying countries worldwide to designate far-left terrorism as primary global stability threat. Religious experts condemned Trump for sharing AI-generated image depicting himself as Jesus Christ. Pope Leo XIV calling for peace in Iran Gaza and Ukraine from his Africa tour.

news.title: NASA Artemis II Humans Return to Lunar Orbit
news.text: NASA Artemis II mission has launched sending astronauts aboard Orion to loop around the Moon. Humanity first crewed lunar mission in over half a century. The milestone sparked widespread public excitement described as a sense of reverence.

news.title: Spain Economy Outperforms IBEX35 Consolidates at Highs
news.text: IMF Article IV confirmed Spain GDP growth at 2.1% for 2026 well above euro area average. IBEX35 consolidating near 18,240 after a historic 49.27% gain in 2025 best year since 1993. Banking sector contributed 70% of that rally.

news.title: ECB Holds Rates Senator Threatens to Block Warsh as Fed Chair
news.text: The ECB signalled not yet ready to resume rate hikes despite mounting inflation pressure from Iran war oil costs. A key Senate Republican is threatening to block Kevin Warsh nomination as Federal Reserve Chair.

news.title: UK GDP Plus 0.5% in February Sharply Beats Expectations
news.text: UK economic output grew 0.5% month-on-month in February 2026 significantly beating forecasts despite Iran war energy cost headwinds. The result bolsters the case for higher-for-longer Bank of England rate path.

news.title: Food Prices Surge Fertilizer Up 20% on Energy Costs
news.text: Prices for meat wheat coffee and sugar are rising sharply as energy-intensive food supply chain bears the full burden of elevated oil prices. Anhydrous ammonia fertilizer is up more than 20% year-to-date.

day_ahead: April 17 2026 KEY EVENTS: (1) US-Iran ceasefire diplomacy any extension announcement before April 21 triggers oil selloff and equity rally. (2) Netflix stock reaction at open pre-market -9%. (3) ECB speakers any hawkish signals. (4) Earnings season continues US banks and consumer staples Q1 reports. (5) Kevin Warsh Fed Chair nomination Senate resistance watch bond yields. (6) Asia tech follow-through will Europe open higher. (7) BTC $75K resistance test sustained close above is bullish rejection risks $73K. (8) Spain politics PSC coalition dynamics in Catalan parliament.

ai_news.title: Anthropic Launches Claude Mythos 5 10 Trillion Parameters
ai_news.text: Anthropic released Claude Mythos 5 a 10-trillion parameter model targeting advanced cybersecurity and complex coding. The largest publicly known model by parameter count. Anthropic approaching $19B ARR refused US DoD deployment on ethical grounds sending Claude to number-one on US App Store amid QuitGPT movement with 2.5 million supporters.

ai_news.title: OpenAI Crosses $25B ARR Eyes Late-2026 IPO
ai_news.text: OpenAI has surpassed $25 billion in annualized revenue and is taking early steps toward a public listing potentially as soon as late 2026. GPT-5.4 released in March achieved record scores on computer-use benchmarks. Sam Altman faces governance scrutiny ahead of IPO.

ai_news.title: OpenAI Anthropic and Google Unite Against Chinese Model Extraction
ai_news.text: The three leading US AI labs formed a coordinated effort via the Frontier Model Forum to combat Chinese competitors extracting capabilities from cutting-edge US models sharing intelligence on extraction attempts.

ai_news.title: Anthropic MCP Crosses 97 Million Installs Foundational AI Infrastructure
ai_news.text: Anthropic Model Context Protocol reached 97 million installs in March 2026 crossing from experimental standard to foundational AI agent infrastructure. Every major AI provider now ships MCP-compatible tooling.

ai_news.title: Google Gemini 3.1 Real-Time Voice and Vision Plus 6x Memory Compression
ai_news.text: Google DeepMind released Gemini 3.1 with real-time voice and image analysis capabilities. A companion compression algorithm slashes AI model memory requirements by 6x. Gemini 3.1 Pro topped reasoning benchmarks at 94.3% on GPQA Diamond.
